title: Architects, Except Landscape and Naval
description: Plan and design structures, such as private residences, office buildings, theaters, factories, and other structural property.

tasks.text: Develop final construction plans that include aesthetic representations of the structure or details for its construction.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare scale drawings or architectural designs, using computer-aided design or other tools.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare information regarding design, structure specifications, materials, color, equipment, estimated costs, or construction time.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult with clients to determine functional or spatial requirements of structures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Meet with clients to review or discuss architectural drawings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor the work of specialists, such as electrical engineers, mechanical engineers, interior designers, or sound specialists to ensure optimal form or function of designs or final structures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Integrate engineering elements into unified architectural designs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan layouts of structural architectural projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct periodic on-site observations of construction work to monitor compliance with plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare contract documents for building contractors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan or design structures such as residences, office buildings, theatres, factories, or other structural properties in accordance with environmental, safety, or other regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct activities of technicians engaged in preparing drawings or specification documents.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Administer construction contracts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create three-dimensional or interactive representations of designs, using computer-assisted design software.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Represent clients in obtaining bids or awarding construction contracts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop marketing materials, proposals, or presentations to generate new work opportunities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform predesign services, such as feasibility or environmental impact studies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design structures that incorporate environmentally friendly building practices or concepts, such as Leadership in Energy and Environmental Design (LEED) standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design or plan construction of green building projects to minimize adverse environmental impact or conserve energy.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Gather information related to projects' environmental sustainability or operational efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect proposed building sites to determine suitability for construction.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Design environmentally sound structural upgrades to existing buildings, such as natural lighting systems, green roofs, or rainwater collection systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Calculate potential energy savings by comparing estimated energy consumption of proposed design to baseline standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare operating and maintenance manuals, studies, or reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
